security_findings.description: S3 bucket should not allow public read access
security_findings.recommendation: Set acl to 'private' or use bucket policies with restricted access

security_findings.description: S3 bucket should have encryption enabled
security_findings.recommendation: Enable AES-256 or AWS-KMS encryption for data at rest

security_findings.description: S3 bucket should not allow public write access
security_findings.recommendation: Remove public write permissions immediately. Use pre-signed URLs for temporary write access

security_findings.description: S3 bucket should have encryption enabled
security_findings.recommendation: Enable AES-256 or AWS-KMS encryption for data at rest

security_findings.description: S3 bucket should have encryption enabled
security_findings.recommendation: Enable AES-256 or AWS-KMS encryption for data at rest

security_findings.description: RDS backup retention period is too short
security_findings.recommendation: Set backup_retention_period to at least 7 days for disaster recovery
